title: Mount Merakan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Location |image=[[File:Mount_Merakan.jpg]] |name=Mount Merakan |created= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Maramere]] |terrain= |fauna= |flora= |interest= |affiliation=[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] }} {{Quote|This place is riddled with drilling rigs! They've ripped up the whole area!''"
"''The Trade Federation doesn't care what it destroys, as long as they get what they need.'|[[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and [[Jinkins]]|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''}} '''Mount Merakan''' was the tallest mountain on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Maramere]], on the world's largest island. Prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] established a base of operations within the mountain. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Maramere locations]] [[Category:Mountains|Merakan]] [[Category:Trade Federation locations]]
